news.title:
Strait of Hormuz disruption may impact fertiliser supply & prices, critical for imported urea, DAP, MOP.
Stocks like Coromandel, Deepak Fertilisers, Deepak Nitrite may face effects; govt support may cushion volatility.
news.summary:
Strait of Hormuz disruption may impact fertiliser supply & prices, critical for imported urea, DAP, MOP.
Stocks like Coromandel, Deepak Fertilisers, Deepak Nitrite may face effects; govt support may cushion volatility.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers surged 7.3% intraday on Feb 9, 2026, reaching Rs 1,070.05.
The stock outperformed the Fertilizers sector and Sensex, showing strong momentum.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers surged 7.3% intraday on Feb 9, 2026, reaching Rs 1,070.05.
The stock outperformed the Fertilizers sector and Sensex, showing strong momentum.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers' subsidiary DMSL faces Rs. 345.8 cr tax demand for AY 2024-25.
Issue stems from disallowed depreciation post-demerger; DMSL to contest legally citing past rulings.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers' subsidiary DMSL faces Rs. 345.8 cr tax demand for AY 2024-25.
Issue stems from disallowed depreciation post-demerger; DMSL to contest legally citing past rulings.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers fell 4.73% on 30 Jan to close at 1,055.05.
The decline reflects weak quarterly results and underperformance against market indices.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers fell 4.73% on 30 Jan to close at 1,055.05.
The decline reflects weak quarterly results and underperformance against market indices.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers plans Q1 FY27 commissioning of Gopalpur TAN and Dahej Nitric Acid projects.
The company reports 10-12% YTD revenue growth.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers plans Q1 FY27 commissioning of Gopalpur TAN and Dahej Nitric Acid projects.
The company reports 10-12% YTD revenue growth.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers' Q3 revenue rose 10%, but EBITDA and PAT declined YoY.
Focus on specialty, consumer markets with strategic acquisitions and planned capex.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers' Q3 revenue rose 10%, but EBITDA and PAT declined YoY.
Focus on specialty, consumer markets with strategic acquisitions and planned capex.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers approved Q3 and 9-month unaudited financials for Dec 2025.
The company will close a 300 TPD methanol plant, idle since Aug 2021, to free land and cut environmental impact.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers approved Q3 and 9-month unaudited financials for Dec 2025.
The company will close a 300 TPD methanol plant, idle since Aug 2021, to free land and cut environmental impact.

news.title: Deepak Fertilizers reports Q3 net profit of ₹1.42B, down from ₹2.5B YoY.
news.summary: Deepak Fertilizers reports Q3 net profit of ₹1.42B, down from ₹2.5B YoY.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers' subsidiary saw Rs. 382.8 Cr penalty appeals dropped for FY 2016-19.
Penalties of Rs. 252.5 Cr and Rs. 226.3 Cr were imposed earlier; Rs. 96 Cr appeal pending for FY 2015-16.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers' subsidiary saw Rs. 382.8 Cr penalty appeals dropped for FY 2016-19.
Penalties of Rs. 252.5 Cr and Rs. 226.3 Cr were imposed earlier; Rs. 96 Cr appeal pending for FY 2015-16.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers resolves appeals for AY 2013-19 involving Rs. 215 Cr as CIT-A Mumbai allows them.
Prior disallowances are under legal appeal, and management considers them defensible. Rectifications for AY 2013-20 continue.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers resolves appeals for AY 2013-19 involving Rs. 215 Cr as CIT-A Mumbai allows them.
Prior disallowances are under legal appeal, and management considers them defensible. Rectifications for AY 2013-20 continue.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers faced penalties of Rs. 35.5M for nondisclosure of assets.
Issues involved immovable property, investments, and contingent liabilities; case resolved.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers faced penalties of Rs. 35.5M for nondisclosure of assets.
Issues involved immovable property, investments, and contingent liabilities; case resolved.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness saw a 23.7x volume surge to 1.42L shares, gaining 6.9% to Rs.453.2. Swan Corp volumes rose 20x to 15.06L, up 0.35% to Rs.472.55.
Blue Star volume surged 8.8x to 1.45L shares, up 0.74% to Rs.1720.4. JSW Steel and Deepak Fertilisers also saw significant volume and price increases.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness saw a 23.7x volume surge to 1.42L shares, gaining 6.9% to Rs.453.2. Swan Corp volumes rose 20x to 15.06L, up 0.35% to Rs.472.55.
Blue Star volume surged 8.8x to 1.45L shares, up 0.74% to Rs.1720.4. JSW Steel and Deepak Fertilisers also saw significant volume and price increases.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers subsidiary to acquire 100% equity in an explosives firm.
Acquisition targets export growth via new ammonium nitrate capacities, closing by April 2026.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers subsidiary to acquire 100% equity in an explosives firm.
Acquisition targets export growth via new ammonium nitrate capacities, closing by April 2026.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers' subsidiary, DMSL, to acquire 100% equity of an explosives maker.
Acquisition supports export of value-added products via Gopalpur TAN plant and Australian subsidiary.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers' subsidiary, DMSL, to acquire 100% equity of an explosives maker.
Acquisition supports export of value-added products via Gopalpur TAN plant and Australian subsidiary.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers’ subsidiaries face income tax demands: Rs.104.5 crore for Deepak Mining and Rs.2.2 crore for Mahadhan AgriTech.
Demands pertain to AY 2022-23 and 2024-25; no contraventions alleged, and proceedings are ongoing.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers’ subsidiaries face income tax demands: Rs.104.5 crore for Deepak Mining and Rs.2.2 crore for Mahadhan AgriTech.
Demands pertain to AY 2022-23 and 2024-25; no contraventions alleged, and proceedings are ongoing.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers faced allegations of non-disclosure of investments, property, and liabilities.
The company paid Rs.35.5 lakh as compounding fees for FY 2017-22 to avoid litigation.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers faced allegations of non-disclosure of investments, property, and liabilities.
The company paid Rs.35.5 lakh as compounding fees for FY 2017-22 to avoid litigation.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers' tax demand reduced from ₹18.29 cr to ₹1.72 cr by tax officer.
Penalty cut to ₹1.83 cr, ₹45.7 lakh interest waived; company to appeal at GST Tribunal.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers' tax demand reduced from ₹18.29 cr to ₹1.72 cr by tax officer.
Penalty cut to ₹1.83 cr, ₹45.7 lakh interest waived; company to appeal at GST Tribunal.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers' subsidiary to invest Rs. 75 cr in Agri AIF fund.
Move aims at agritech growth with rights to appoint investment committee rep.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers' subsidiary to invest Rs. 75 cr in Agri AIF fund.
Move aims at agritech growth with rights to appoint investment committee rep.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers' subsidiary MAL to invest up to Rs.75 Cr in SOA Fund, Series I under SEBI Category II AIF.
Investment aims to position MAL as an agritech player, accessing innovative models for strategic growth opportunities.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers' subsidiary MAL to invest up to Rs.75 Cr in SOA Fund, Series I under SEBI Category II AIF.
Investment aims to position MAL as an agritech player, accessing innovative models for strategic growth opportunities.

news.title:
Deepak Fertilisers Q2 FY26 revenue grew 9% YoY to INR 3,006 Cr.
EBITDA margins fell to 15%; TAN volume rose 29%, Crop Nutrition 54%.
news.summary:
Deepak Fertilisers Q2 FY26 revenue grew 9% YoY to INR 3,006 Cr.
EBITDA margins fell to 15%; TAN volume rose 29%, Crop Nutrition 54%.
